hooks.command: ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel); modified=$(stat -f %m "$ROOT/AI_USAGE.md" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); now=$(date +%s); age=$(( (now - modified) / 3600 )); [ $age -gt 8 ] && echo "⚠️  AI_USAGE.md last updated ${age}h ago — append session entry per CLAUDE.md"; echo 'TODO: Append AI_USAGE.md entry. Update README.md if features changed.' > "$ROOT/.claude/session-reminder.md"
